name: Genetec Security Center API
what_it_does: Genetec Security Center REST API and SDK for enterprise unified physical security platform. Enables AI agents to manage video management and camera control, handle access control and cardholder management, access license plate recognition (LPR) data, retrieve alarm and incident management, manage security event analytics, handle federated multi-site security management, access intrusion detection and sensor data, retrieve investigation and evidence management, manage security reports and dashboards, and integrate physical security with PSIM, ITSM, and enterprise operations platforms.
use_cases: Managing access control and cardholder permissions from security operations agents
Accessing video analytics and LPR data from physical security intelligence agents
Retrieving security events and alarms from SOC automation agents
Integrating physical security with enterprise ITSM from unified security agents
not_for: Small businesses without enterprise-scale multi-site physical security
Cloud-native deployments without on-premises Genetec Security Center
Single-camera deployments without unified VMS and access control needs
best_when: A large enterprise, government agency, transportation hub, or critical infrastructure operator using Genetec Security Center wants AI agents to automate access management, video analytics, incident response, evidence management, and multi-site security operations.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Video surveillance of individuals is highly sensitive. LPR data tracks vehicle and individual movements. Biometric access control data requires strict protection. Government and critical infrastructure deployments may have CJIS, ITAR, or classified data requirements. Surveillance automation must comply with local laws.

auth.notes: Genetec uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for Security Center API access. Organization-level credentials with video, access, and event scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. C# and Python SDKs. Genetec SDK for on-premises integration. Webhooks for security events. Strong enterprise integration ecosystem.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise physical security licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-camera and per-door enterprise licensing; annual maintenance
pricing.notes: Montreal, Canada. Founded 1997. Enterprise physical security platform leader. Used by airports, cities, casinos, hospitals, and enterprises globally. Security Center unifies VMS, access control, and LPR. Private company (no public market). Strong government and critical infrastructure market. Competes with Milestone and Avigilon for enterprise VMS.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: LPR and video data tracks individual movements — strict data governance required
CJIS compliance for law enforcement integrations — criminal justice data has strict access controls
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with C# and Python SDKs and developer portal
On-premises Security Center vs Genetec Cloud — API configuration differs significantly
Critical infrastructure security — automation must have failsafe modes; never lock out emergency responders
Biometric access data (fingerprint, iris) requires additional BIPA and local biometric law compliance
agent_readiness.security_notes: Physical security and LPR data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, CJIS. OAuth2. Multi-region. Critical infrastructure.

security_score_components.security_notes: Physical security surveillance data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, CJIS. OAuth2. Multi-region. Critical infrastructure.
